apiKey.title: Jooble API Key
apiKey.description: Your Jooble API key. Register free at https://jooble.org/api/about

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of search keywords. Each is searched separately and results combined.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location for the search. Leave empty or use 'All Australia' for nationwide.

maxResults.title: Max Results per keyword
maxResults.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect per keyword.

fetchDescriptions.title: Fetch Full Descriptions
fetchDescriptions.description: If true (default), visits each job's source URL with Playwright to extract the full description. Set to false to use Jooble's teaser/snippet only (faster, no browser).
